name: Lemon Filbert Logs
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg white; beaten with 1 tbsp Water
recipeInstructions:
DESCRIPTION: Lemony butter logs rolled in filberts (hazelnuts).
Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream together the butter, brown sugar, and lemon rind until fluffy. Sift together the flour and salt, then add them along with the lemon juice to the mixture. Mix well. Chill for several hours. Shape into "fingers" about 1 1/2 inches long and 3/4 inch in diameter. Roll each log in egg white beaten with water, then roll in chopped filberts. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen.
